terms.title: DVC (Data Version Control)
terms.summary: DVC (Data Version Control) belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning. Compare it with Prompt version control and Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC).
